text:
(In reply to Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez from comment #6)

good it went very well
I do not present errors
when taking out hamlib I delete cqrlog
but compile like this
hamlib
wsjtz
cqrlog

and I walk cqrlog with the new hamlib

I leave you the photos of the screen

I think you can apply the same patches from wsjtz to wsjtx
since the difference is only from the automatic part

with this you could already have 3 new soft
hamlib + wsjt Z/X

then it would be missing to see the topic of updating cqrlog since wsjt needs cqrlog to archive and manage the contacts made
